data.title: Ready Capital Corporation Declares First Quarter 2026 Dividends
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Ready Capital Corporation revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.01 for each share of common stock and Operating Partnership unit for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. Shareholders as of the end of business on March 31, 2026, will receive the dividend on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Metals Acquisition Corp. II Announces Closing of $230 Million Initial Public Offering Including Exercise of Underwriters’ Over-Allotment Option in Full
data.description: Metals Acquisition Corp. II (NYSE: MTAL.U) has successfully completed its initial public offering in George Town, Cayman Islands, on March 13, 2026. The Company announced the closure of its IPO, which consisted of 23,000,000 units, including 3,000,000 units sold due to the underwriters' full exercise of their over-allotment option. The public offering price was set at $10.00 per unit. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one-third of one redeemable warrant. Investors have the option to exercise each whole warrant to purchase one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share.

data.title: Caliber Sets Date for Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Announcement & Investor Conference Call
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Caliber (Nasdaq: CWD), a real estate and digital asset management company, shared plans to disclose its Q4 2025 financial outcomes post-market close on March 25, 2026. An invitation has been extended by management for interested individuals to join the webcast/conference call at 5:00 pm ET on the same day to delve into these results.
US bank deposits rose to $18.816 trln from $18.810 trln in prior week.

data.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP Notifies Stockholders of an Investigation into the Fairness of the Acquisition of European Wax Center, Inc
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP released a statement addressing individuals or entities who acquired shares of European Wax Center, Inc. (NASDAQ: EWCZ) before February 10, 2026. If you fall into this category, be aware that a communication has been issued to notify you of the following information:

data.title: CBL Properties Announces Over $600 Million in Landmark Financing Transactions
data.description: CBL Properties, a real estate investment trust trading under the ticker symbol CBL, recently shared news regarding their successful refinancing efforts. The company announced that they have completed refinancing their $634 million term loan through two separate transactions. One transaction involved securing a $425 million non-recourse financing backed by a collection of mainly mall properties. Additionally, CBL is in the final stages of closing a $176 million floating-rate bank loan primarily supported by a portfolio of thriving open-air lifestyle centers. The newly secured $425 million financing marks a significant development for the company.

data.title: DoveRunner Launches License Cipher Gateway: Standalone On-Premises License Protection for Organizations With Existing Multi-DRM Systems
data.description: In San Jose, California, DoveRunner, a prominent company specializing in content security and mobile app security, has revealed the release of License Cipher Gateway. This new standalone on-premises solution offers enhanced license protection for streaming platforms and content providers utilizing Multi-DRM systems. License Cipher Gateway serves as a crucial verification layer above traditional DRM systems, filling a significant void in content security. This enhancement is essential for ensuring the protection of valuable digital assets.

data.title: Gallopade Earns Tier 1 Rating in Alabama Social Studies Textbook Review
data.description: A publisher headquartered in Atlanta, Gallopade International, has achieved a Tier 1 rating from the Alabama Board of Education for its K-6 Social Studies curriculum. This recognition marks the top score across K-6 grades. Gallopade is the exclusive recipient of this rating, standing out for its outstanding educational materials. This achievement underscores Gallopade's dedication to providing high-quality educational resources for students.
S&P 500 has the longest weekly losing streak since March 2025.

data.title: Zeta Global to join investor conference soon, discusses growth strategy and financial results.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global unemployment rate has risen to 6.7%, with approximately 203 million people currently without a job. The youth unemployment rate stands at a staggering 13.1%, affecting an estimated 65 million individuals. These figures highlight the serious impact of the ongoing economic challenges on the workforce worldwide. Additionally, the report noted that women continue to be disproportionately affected by unemployment, with the gender gap in labor force participation rates widening. The situation calls for immediate attention and effective strategies to address the growing unemployment crisis.

data.title: HealthStream Announces Share Repurchase Program
data.description: HealthStream, a prominent healthcare technology platform company specializing in clinical workforce solutions, revealed today that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a new share buyback initiative for the company’s common stock, permitting the repurchase of up to $10 million worth of outstanding shares. The program allows for repurchases to be conducted intermittently in the open market, potentially including transactions carried out through Rule 10b5-1 plans.

data.title: Autoscope Technologies Corporation Announces 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Autoscope Technologies Corporation disclosed plans for their 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, set for April 16, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time. This event will be held virtually and accessed online. Shareholders eligible for participation were determined based on holdings recorded by February 16, 2026. Proxy materials will be distributed electronically, with a Notice of Internet Availability of Proxy Materials issued to shareholders. All relevant documents can be found on Autoscope’s profile on the OTCQX website at https://www.otcmarkets.com/stock/AATC/disclosure and on the Financial Information section of Autoscope’s official website at https://autoscope.com/financial-information.html.

data.title: Navios Maritime Partners L.P. Announces Availability of Its Form 20-F for the Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Navios Maritime Partners L.P. disclosed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year terminating on December 31, 2025, to the SEC. The report is available for viewing on the company's website, www.navios-mlp.com, specifically in the "Investors" section. Navios Partners' stock is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol NMM.

data.title: Vitesse Energy Announces Hedging Update and Board Member Transition
data.description: In Greenwood Village, Colorado, Vitesse Energy, Inc. disclosed a significant update: the company, trading under NYSE symbol VTS, recently executed additional hedges spanning until 2027. These hedges are set at price points that reinforce its dividend structure. The firm aims to secure a more stable cash flow by hedging a segment of its forecasted oil, natural gas, and NGL output. Additionally, M. Bruce Chernoff, a member of Vitesse's Board of Directors, has transitioned from his role.
Universal Logistics Holdings, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results; Declares Dividend

data.title: Center for Advanced Reproductive Services Brings Personalized Fertility Care to Danbury
data.description: In Danbury, Connecticut, a new fertility center named the Center for Advanced Reproductive Services (CARS) has opened at 73 Sand Pit Road. Affiliated with the UConn School of Medicine, this nationally renowned center brings personalized, empowering, and trusted fertility care to the region. Dr. Maya Barsky (MD, MSCI), a board-certified reproductive endocrinologist, leads the facility. This new location aims to provide exceptional fertility services to families in western Connecticut.

data.title: Agero Enters into Agreement to Acquire Urgently, for $5.50 in Cash Per Share, Expanding Tech-Driven Roadside Assistance Across Automotive, Fleet, Rental, and Insurance Markets
data.description: The merger of Urgently and Agero brings together their cutting-edge technology and extensive reach to improve services for automakers, insurers, and mobility and service providers. This acquisition leverages the strengths of both companies, creating a powerful force in the industry. The increased scale and technological advancements will significantly enhance the experiences of clients. This strategic move is set to revolutionize the sector, offering new possibilities for growth and innovation to all stakeholders involved.

data.title: Circle stock surges in the face of market downturn as stablecoins penetrate finance. Canaan ups BTC reserves; Wells Fargo eyes crypto ops.
data.description: The stock of the USDC issuer is experiencing a significant increase even in the midst of a market downturn, showcasing the growth of stablecoins within traditional finance. Additionally, Canaan has made a move to increase their Bitcoin reserves, while Wells Fargo is considering entering the cryptocurrency services sector. These developments reflect a growing trend towards digital assets, with the USDC issuer's stock showing notable gains despite market challenges.
